top_signals.title: Deere Keeps Outlook With Construction Boost as Farmers Struggle
top_signals.summary: Deere & Co. reiterated its annual profit outlook Thursday as gains in construction and forestry helped to offset a still-slumping agricultural economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Zuckerberg's Meta layoffs memo: 'Success isn't a given' in the AI era
top_signals.summary: Meta on Wednesday commenced its latest round of layoffs, which affect about 10% of the company's workforce or roughly 8,000 jobs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Economically reckless’ – Streeting calls for wealth tax ‘that works’ in pitch for leadership
top_signals.summary: Wes Streeting has called for a “wealth tax that works” as the former health secretary sets out his stall ahead of an expected Labour leadership contest later this year. top_signals.title: Takaichi Cabinet’s approval rate almost flat at 59.4%
top_signals.summary: By political party, Takaichi's ruling Liberal Democratic Party remained the most popular party, backed by 27.8% of all respondents, up 2.1 points.
